qa_pair.question: Which subscription/platform tier is the account on, according to placetel_get_me?
What is the primary email address registered on the account (placetel_get_me)?
What company name is registered on the account (placetel_get_me)?
In which year was the account created (created_at from placetel_get_me)?
What is the numeric account id (id from placetel_get_me)?
What SIP registration domain do the account's SIP users belong to (domain from placetel_list_sip_users)?
How many phone numbers does the account have (count via placetel_list_numbers)?
What caller id is configured on the first SIP user (callerid from placetel_list_sip_users)?
List the account's numbers. What is the E.164 representation of the first number (e164 field)?
How many SIP users are configured on the account (count via placetel_list_sip_users)?
